students.name: Chloe
students.misconception: Highly enthusiastic, but struggles with multi-step word problems. Gets overwhelmed if too much information is presented at once.

students.name: Marcus
students.misconception: Quiet and lacks confidence in abstract concepts. Avoids answering until heavily scaffolded.

students.name: Amara
students.misconception: Exhibits high math anxiety. Over-relies on memorized procedural steps without understanding the underlying conceptual structure.
